extraction.one_line_summary: O'CONNOR Ben attacked solo with 12km remaining on La Molina, held off SOLER Marc's late chase to win by seconds
tactical_patterns: MOVISTAR pace-setting on climbs systematically isolates rival teams before final ascent, BikeExchange repeatedly vulnerable this tactic.
O'CONNOR launched when solo breakaway caught with 12km remaining, exploiting disorganized chase behind fatigued peloton.
SOLER counterattack on downhill section 3km out nearly bridged, revealing late chasers gain most time descending not climbing.

rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: demonstrated Grand Tour climbing ability in one-day stage, sustaining 12km solo effort against organized pursuers
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: abandoned mid-race visibly unwell, physical condition compromised before mountains began
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: struggled early on moderate climbs despite winning stage 1, durability questionable in mountain stages
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: distanced multiple times requiring chase efforts, appeared tail-off on final climb though survived
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: finished second behind O'CONNOR, sprint defeated QUINTANA for minor places showing strong form
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: only rider able to organize meaningful pursuit, nearly closed 12km gap on descent
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: finished third but unable to respond when O'CONNOR attacked despite proximity
